name: Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
definition: A chronic lung disease characterized by airflow limitation
etiology: Smoking, air pollution, occupational exposure, respiratory infections
symptoms: Chronic cough, sputum production, shortness of breath, dyspnea
treatment_principles: Quit smoking, bronchodilators, glucocorticoids, oxygen therapy, rehabilitation training
prevention_advice: Quit smoking, avoid air pollution, prevent respiratory infections, get flu vaccine
